programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon
programme.desc: Moana meets Brave with the hit new animation Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon. The story of a young girl who was born and grew up in the deepest jungle of the Amazon.

programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: A group of middle school friends go on the hunt for treasure after finding a skeleton in the woods.

programme.title: Snow White & The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A magic curse turns seven boastful princes into dwarfs until they can find a princess who would restore their appearance with a kiss. At the same time, nearby Snow White finds a pair of magic shoes that can transform her appearance at will. Based on the fairytale by the Brothers Grimm.

programme.title: Cecil
programme.desc: Cecil's name reveals his lisp so he changes it to “Michael Jordan.” His school learns a lesson about acceptance after he and his friends start a business that sells celebrity names to kids.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: My Evil Stepdad
programme.desc: After being pushed out of her mother's life by her new stepfather, Ashley must prove his true deadly motives. Starring Chris Johnson (2019)

programme.title: The Narcissist
programme.desc: A woman falls in love with a handsome professor but as their romance blossoms, she begins to suspect she is being manipulated. Starring Amber Goldfarb (2019)

programme.title: Disaster Zone: Volcano in New York
programme.desc: The manager of a construction crew has to save New York when experimental technology causes a volcano to erupt under the city. Starring Michael Ironside and Costas Mandylor (2006).

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The citizens of Spokane, a small town in Washington state, awaken to the sight of North Korean paratroopers dropping from the sky. The U.S.A. has been invaded and their hometown is the initial target. Without warning, the town is unable to fight back and finds itself under enemy occupation.

programme.title: A Hologram for the King
programme.desc: A Hologram for the King follows businessman Alan Clay (Tom Hanks) on a journey halfway around the world, far from his American roots, to a rising Saudi Arabian city.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Based on the popular line of Mattel toys and the hit TV series, "Max Steel" is a teenage superhero for the next generation, combining action, comedy, and cutting edge special effects into an epic adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Mafia loan shark turned Hollywood Producer Chili Palmer in this sharp sequel to "Get Shorty." With an unbelievably hip all-star cast that also includes Uma Thurman, André 3000, Steve Tyler, Christina Milian and The Rock, and bursting with the hottest music in the biz.

programme.title: The Wedding Ring
programme.desc: Kate Sterling's entire life is about proposals. As a jewelry designer she's created rings for more happy couples than she can count, however none for herself yet. At her sister's marriage, Kate is given a second change to connect with her childhood sweetheart. Now she has to decide whether their feelings have changed, or if the wedding will re-kindle the sparks that once united them giving Kate the ring she's been waiting for her whole life.

programme.title: The Silver Brumby
programme.desc: In the unforgiving wilderness of the Australian Alps, there roams a stallion like no other, the Silver Brumby. Now, one horseman sets off on an unforgettable adventure to capture the horse that according to legend, could never be tamed.

programme.title: Bigger
programme.desc: A rags-to-riches biopic of visionary Joe Weider, set in the world of fitness. Brothers Joe & Ben Weider were the architects of muscle.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: A train accident in rural Nebraska gradually unveils a mystery involving the town's bank clerk. Starring: Cillian Murphy, Ellen Page, Susan Sarandon

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog fight for survival after their plane crashes in the wilderness.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Come Away
programme.desc: The film follows the adventures of siblings Alice and Peter who transform into Peter Pan and Alice in Wonderland in a bid to help their parents - played by Oyelowo and Jolie - overcome the tragedy of losing their eldest son. Peter and Alice find strength in the power of their imaginations and set off on a real adventure to try and rescue the family - escaping to a destiny of eternal boyhood in the distant isle of Neverland - whilst Alice delves into a world of Wonderland.

programme.title: The Spy Gone North
programme.desc: A critically-acclaimed, edge of your seat spy thriller from director Jong-bin Yoon. 1993 Korea, the Cold War continues and tensions surrounding the development of nuclear weapons escalate. Seok-young Park, an army major in the South Korea military intelligence is assigned to infiltrate the North Korean nuclear facility. However, he soon learns a secret that is shared by both nations.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: Heart-warming and hilarious, this family tale stars Academy Award nominee Clive Owen (Children of Men) and Maria Bello (A History of Violence). Walt, a down-on-his luck carpenter, is tasked with entertaining his eight-year-old son Anthony. But when Walt's prized toolbox is stolen, a quiet father-and-son weekend turns into an adventure of a lifetime. This sincere story of fatherhood is a must see!

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: A young divorce mediator remains cynical until a client's dog pairs her with a local vet.

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: Love By Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip, a woman enlists the mechanic to be her fake boyfriend. Starring Henderson Wade (2020)

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Workaholic Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies.

programme.title: Swiped
programme.desc: A womanising college student enlists his nerdy roommate to code the ultimate hook up app by offering to pay his tuition for MIT but unexpected consequences ensue.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: In A Day
programme.desc: A young woman spends a curiously unpredictable day with a stranger.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: Love Switch
programme.desc: On their 13th wedding anniversary, James and Michelle wake up to discover they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to understand what the other goes through daily.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Minor Details
programme.desc: Someone at the prestigious Danforth Academy is trying to make the students sick! Who could be behind such a terrible trick? Is it Mia and Riley, the rich girls? Or could it be Emily, the Principal's daughter? Maybe it's the wacky Sean Niminsky, or even the eccentric Professor Plume. Whoever it is, Abby, Page, Claire, and Taylor will have to put aside their differences and band together to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A young woman who was abducted as an infant, solves her own kidnapping.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: True crime writer, Kate, believes her children book writing days with her ex-boyfriend, Josh, are long over until her publisher requests a sequel. When problems begin to rise during the creative process, Kate and Josh decide to relive their past forcing them to fall in love all over again.

programme.title: I Am That
programme.desc: A nun's eight-day adventure to resolve questions of doubt unites her with a gentle teenager and a handsome drifter who affects her heart and future.

programme.title: What Would Jesus Do? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: The journey continues from What Would Jesus Do? (2010) as the drifter arrives into a new town inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: Phony Express
programme.desc: Set in the old west, the Stooges are three tramps wanted for vagrancy. After ruining a medicine peddlers show, they arrive in Peaceful Gulch where a picture has been printed declaring them to be three famous lawmen coming to clean up the town. Assigned to guard the bank, the boys have the local gang scared at first, but when the gang learns who the Stooges really are, they rob the bank. The boys go in pursuit, find the bad guy's hideout, subdue the bandits and recover the money.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college (Scarlett Johansson, Kate McKinnon, Jillian Bell, Ilana Glazer and Zoë Kravitz) reunite 10 years later for a wild weekend getaway in Miami. Their outrageous antics and hard partying result in hilarious unexpected consequences which land them in a seemingly impossible situation to escape.

programme.title: Buddy Goes West
programme.desc: Two outlaws, "The Doctor" and the Indian Girolamo, help a village fight a gang and a corrupt sheriff who has discovered gold beneath the town.

programme.title: Lightning Jack
programme.desc: Lightning Jack Kane is an Australian outlaw in the wild west. During a bungled bank robbery he picks up mute Ben Doyle as a hostage. The two become good friends, with Jack teaching Ben how to rob banks, while they plan Jack's last heist.

programme.title: Killer Goodbye
programme.desc: A young man goes back to his hometown ten years after killing the killer of his parents. Once there he is asked to help the sheriff.

programme.title: Silent Thunder
programme.desc: With the help of two bank robbers, a US Marshal sets out to rescue five prostitutes who have been abducted by a gang of desert dwelling, otherworldly, monsters

programme.title: The Dark Man
programme.desc: A peaceful seaside village is shocked by a sudden and vicious double murder when a beautiful young actress informs the police that she may able to identify the killer.

programme.title: Eight O'Clock Walk
programme.desc: Tom Manning, a taxi driver, is falsely accused of the murder of an eight-year-old girl on a derelict bomb site. Jill, his loyal young wife, bewildered by legal procedure, fights for and wins the active sympathy of Peter Tanner, Junior Counsel for the Defense. Against heavy odds Peter proves himself a barrister of ability and resource.

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: When six-year-old Robbie runs away he stumbles upon a man, Chris, with a dead body. Scared that Robbie will report him, he takes him. They become close as they spend time together and when Robbie becomes ill, Chris has to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Benson Gray, senior surgeon at Graftondale Hospital, wins another round in his battle with research-minded junior surgeon, Neil Isherwood, when he appoints newly-qualified Philip Selwood as registrar.

programme.title: The Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: Story of how two young models take over a barge moored off Chelsea in which crooks have hidden the proceeds of a large-scale jewel robbery.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: Ten thousand days ago, Comet 23 struck Earth with the magnitude of all the nuclear weapons in the world sending the planet into a deep freeze. Now, 27 years in the future, those who survived are locked in an epic battle of life or death.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: After wrongly supporting a man who later turned out to be a serial killer, journalist Kate Fisher rebuilds her career but is stalked by someone from her past. Melissa George stars. (2010)

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark: A Cry In The Night
programme.desc: Film based on the Mary Higgins Clark novel about a divorced mother who suspects that she and her two children may be in danger because of her insanely jealous new husband. Starring Perry King (1992)

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Antiques expert and amateur sleuth Jennifer is drawn into an investigation that sees an old college friend accused of murder. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange (2016)

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries: Time To Start Livin'
programme.desc: The Postables must unravel a mystery behind a letter from a young boy who could be facing imminent danger. Starring Eric Mabius (2014)

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery: The Julius House
programme.desc: A librarian who hosts a murder mystery book club buys a house where the previous owners disappeared four years ago. The club decides to investigate. Stars Candace Cameron Bure, Lex Doig (2016)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Wild Things: Foursome
programme.desc: A high school guidance counselor is accused of raping two of his female students.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: Berry Gordy's The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable young hero, Leroy (Taimak), who aspires to become a kung fu master. Trouble arises in the form of a huge man who calls himself "Sho' Nuff, who is determined to prove himself the kung fu master of the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom.

programme.title: Pressure Point
programme.desc: Friday Night Lights meets The Social Network. Starring Oscar nominee Michael Shannon and featuring Alexander Ludwig (Vikings) and Charles Melton (Riverdale) is inspirational sports drama, Pressure Point...

programme.title: Listen To Your Heart
programme.desc: A singer/songwriter falls in love with a girl who can't hear the music she inspires him to write.

programme.title: The Healer
programme.desc: As much as Alec yearns to avoid being attributed any healing powers, more bizarre events keep occurring. Alec, in shock, is discovering the family secret he possesses, a gift… the gift of healing, a gift he must accept or reject.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: The British Mi5, his impossibly wife and an international terrorist, debonair art Charlie Mortdecai must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to bank account.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: France is in turmoil and a new, naive King finds himself manipulated by the evil Cardinal Richelieu (James Cosmo, Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan).

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate the murder of a rap group while pursuing their other full-time professions.

programme.title: S3 E26 Belper to Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Dave and Barbara decided to marry on the night they met. Now three years on, the couple want to buy their first home together. Catherine Gee scours the Lincolnshire Fens with £225k for the house that will mark a new start for them and Barbara's son.

programme.title: S3 E28 Poole to Somerset
programme.desc: Comedian Scott is looking for a new country home close to his favorite cricket club, Somerset. But with girlfriend Lisa likely to make the move too, should he spend £250k and live mortgage-free or spend up to half a million pounds on a dream home?

programme.title: S3 E30 York to Yorkshire
programme.desc: Jennie is selling her bed and breakfast following her husband's death. She wants a Yorkshire country home where she can throw parties and teach Malaysian cooking. Catherine Gee must also find a double garage for Jennie's son, who's moving with her.

programme.title: S3 E32 North London to the Chilterns
programme.desc: The arrival of baby Archie means Emma and Scott want to swap their flat in North London for a family home in The Chilterns. Catherine Gee has £425,000 to find the home where Archie will grow up complete with a garden for fun and games.

programme.title: S3 E34 Enfield to Devon
programme.desc: The Miller family have an unusual request for their new home in the country: they need a building big enough to build their own bowling alley. Luckily Mom and Dad have a budget of just over a million-pound budget for their new home in North Devon.

programme.title: S3 E36 Cardiff to Herefordshire
programme.desc: Arun is a bit of a property expert, and he and his wife Rita want to move to Herefordshire where Arun plans to raise pet pigs! So he needs outbuildings and land as well as a house which is full of character.
